case_title: WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P. VS. KENISHA DAVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2593 SUTTER STREET #311, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94115, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $5.03. (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P.
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF UD-120 (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78651441)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971) AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P. SERVED FEB-05-2026, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78582971), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS L.P. SERVED FEB-05-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KENISHA
